def experiment1_images_synthetic(seed: int = 13):
    print("\n=== Experiment 1 (Synthetic) — Accuracy/Calibration/Efficiency on 'Image-like' features ===")
    set_seed(seed)
    device = get_device()

    # Synthetic data resembling features of a frozen encoder
    N_train, N_val, N_test = 1500, 300, 300
    D, C = 64, 5
    X_train = torch.randn(N_train, D)
    X_val = torch.randn(N_val, D)
    X_test = torch.randn(N_test, D)
    W_true = torch.randn(C, D)
    y_train = (X_train @ W_true.T + 0.5 * torch.randn(N_train, C)).argmax(dim=1)
    y_val = (X_val @ W_true.T + 0.5 * torch.randn(N_val, C)).argmax(dim=1)
    y_test = (X_test @ W_true.T + 0.5 * torch.randn(N_test, C)).argmax(dim=1)
    idx_train = torch.arange(N_train)
    idx_val = torch.arange(N_val)
    idx_test = torch.arange(N_test)

    ds_train = FeatureDataset(X_train, y_train, idx_train)
    ds_val = FeatureDataset(X_val, y_val, idx_val)
    ds_test = FeatureDataset(X_test, y_test, idx_test)

    bsz = 256
    train_loader = DataLoader(ds_train, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=True)
    val_loader = DataLoader(ds_val, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=False)
    test_loader = DataLoader(ds_test, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=False)

    head = nn.Linear(D, C, bias=False).to(device)
    head.weight.data.normal_(0, 0.1)

    # Warm-up on a slice (10% of train)
    warm_k = max(1, int(0.1 * N_train))
    warm_idx = np.random.RandomState(seed).choice(N_train, size=warm_k, replace=False)
    warm_loader = DataLoader(FeatureDataset(X_train[warm_idx], y_train[warm_idx], idx_train[warm_idx]), batch_size=bsz, shuffle=True)

    print("[Exp1] Computing diagonal Fisher on warm-up slice...")
    fisher = compute_fisher_diag(warm_loader, head)

    # Validation gradients for accuracy and calibration (temperature surrogate)
    print("[Exp1] Computing validation gradients (acc and cal)...")
    v_acc = validation_gradient(val_loader, head, objective='acc', temperature=1.0)
    v_cal = validation_gradient(val_loader, head, objective='cal', temperature=1.5)

    # Prepare CountSketch hashes
    P = head.weight.numel()
    d_hat = 128
    s_idx, s_sign = create_s_idx_sign(P=P, d_hat=d_hat, seed=seed, device=device)

    # Single streaming pass selection over full train
    stream_loader = DataLoader(ds_train, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=False)
    budgets = (0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5)  # small for synthetic
    print("[Exp1] Running OP-S&V selection pass...")
    reservoir, sel_time, peak_mem, diag = op_snv_select(
        stream_loader, head, d_hat, fisher, v_acc, v_cal, s_idx, s_sign,
        budgets=budgets, gamma=5e-4, forgetting=0.98, r_max=32, seed=seed)
    print(f"[Exp1] Selection completed in {sel_time:.3f}s; peak GPU memory: {peak_mem/1e6:.1f} MB")

    # Extract subsets per budget (nested)
    budget_indices = {}
    for b in budgets:
        k = int(max(1, b * N_train))
        top = reservoir.topk(k)
        budget_indices[b] = [idx for idx, _ in top]
    nestedness = verify_nestedness(budget_indices)
    print(f"[Exp1] Nestedness across budgets: {nestedness*100:.1f}% (expect 100%)")

    # Baselines: Random, LossTop-k, EntropyTop-k, EL2N, GraNd, Herding (if available)
    print("[Exp1] Computing baseline subsets...")
    ce_scores = compute_ce_scores(X_train, y_train, head)
    ent_scores = compute_entropy_scores(X_train, head)
    el2n_scores = compute_el2n_scores([X_train], [y_train], [head])
    grand_scores = compute_grand_scores(X_train, y_train, head)

    bl_random = select_random(N_train, budgets, seed=seed)
    bl_loss = select_topk_by_scores(ce_scores, budgets)
    bl_entropy = select_topk_by_scores(ent_scores, budgets)
    bl_el2n = select_topk_by_scores(el2n_scores, budgets)
    bl_grand = select_topk_by_scores(grand_scores, budgets)
    bl_herding = {}
    if HAVE_SKLEARN:
        for b in budgets:
            k = int(max(1, b * N_train))
            bl_herding[b] = herding_kcenter_indices(X_train.numpy(), k, seed=seed)
    else:
        print("[Exp1] sklearn not available; skipping Herding baseline.")

    # Train/Eval for each budget
    results = {"op-snv": {"acc": [], "nll": [], "ece": []},
               "random": {"acc": [], "nll": [], "ece": []},
               "loss": {"acc": [], "nll": [], "ece": []},
               "entropy": {"acc": [], "nll": [], "ece": []},
               "el2n": {"acc": [], "nll": [], "ece": []},
               "grand": {"acc": [], "nll": [], "ece": []}}
    if HAVE_SKLEARN:
        results["herding"] = {"acc": [], "nll": [], "ece": []}

    for method_name, bdict in [("op-snv", budget_indices), ("random", bl_random), ("loss", bl_loss),
                               ("entropy", bl_entropy), ("el2n", bl_el2n), ("grand", bl_grand)]:
        print(f"[Exp1] Training/evaluating method: {method_name}")
        for b in budgets:
            idxs = bdict[b]
            train_sub_loader = build_loader_from_indices(ds_train, idxs, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=True)
            head_b = nn.Linear(D, C, bias=False).to(device)
            head_b.weight.data.copy_(head.weight.data)  # start from same init
            losses, acc, nll = train_head(train_sub_loader, test_loader, head_b, sample_weights=None, epochs=5, lr=5e-3)
            # Calibration on validation
            with torch.no_grad():
                logits_val = (X_val.to(device) @ head_b.weight.T).cpu().numpy()
            T = temperature_scale_grid(logits_val, y_val.numpy(), T_grid=np.linspace(0.5, 2.0, 16))
            with torch.no_grad():
                logits_test = (X_test.to(device) @ head_b.weight.T).cpu().numpy()
            probs_test = torch.softmax(torch.tensor(logits_test / T), dim=1).numpy()
            ece = compute_ece(probs_test, y_test.numpy(), n_bins=15)
            results[method_name]["acc"].append(acc)
            results[method_name]["nll"].append(nll)
            results[method_name]["ece"].append(ece)
        # Plot training loss curve just for OP-S&V at the largest budget
        if method_name == "op-snv":
            plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))
            sns.lineplot(x=list(range(len(losses))), y=losses)
            plt.xlabel("Step")
            plt.ylabel("Training loss")
            plt.title("Training loss (OP-S&V, last budget)")
            plt.tight_layout()
            plt.savefig("training_loss_op-snv.pdf", bbox_inches="tight")
            plt.close()

    if HAVE_SKLEARN:
        method_name = "herding"
        print(f"[Exp1] Training/evaluating method: {method_name}")
        for b in budgets:
            idxs = bl_herding[b]
            train_sub_loader = build_loader_from_indices(ds_train, idxs, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=True)
            head_b = nn.Linear(D, C, bias=False).to(device)
            head_b.weight.data.copy_(head.weight.data)
            _, acc, nll = train_head(train_sub_loader, test_loader, head_b, sample_weights=None, epochs=5, lr=5e-3)
            with torch.no_grad():
                logits_val = (X_val.to(device) @ head_b.weight.T).cpu().numpy()
            T = temperature_scale_grid(logits_val, y_val.numpy(), T_grid=np.linspace(0.5, 2.0, 16))
            with torch.no_grad():
                logits_test = (X_test.to(device) @ head_b.weight.T).cpu().numpy()
            probs_test = torch.softmax(torch.tensor(logits_test / T), dim=1).numpy()
            ece = compute_ece(probs_test, y_test.numpy(), n_bins=15)
            results[method_name]["acc"].append(acc)
            results[method_name]["nll"].append(nll)
            results[method_name]["ece"].append(ece)

    # Plots: accuracy vs budgets, ECE vs budgets
    def plot_metric_vs_budget(metric: str, filename: str):
        plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))
        for m, col in zip(results.keys(), sns.color_palette(n_colors=len(results))):
            plt.plot([int(b*100) for b in budgets], results[m][metric], marker='o', label=m, color=col)
        plt.xlabel("Budget (%)")
        plt.ylabel(metric.upper())
        plt.title(f"{metric.upper()} vs budget")
        plt.legend(fontsize=8)
        plt.tight_layout()
        plt.savefig(filename, bbox_inches="tight")
        plt.close()
    plot_metric_vs_budget("acc", "accuracy_op-snv_vs_baselines.pdf")
    plot_metric_vs_budget("ece", "ece_op-snv_vs_baselines.pdf")

    # Confusion matrix for OP-S&V largest budget
    last_b = budgets[-1]
    idxs = budget_indices[last_b]
    head_cm = nn.Linear(D, C, bias=False).to(device)
    head_cm.weight.data.copy_(head.weight.data)
    train_sub_loader = build_loader_from_indices(ds_train, idxs, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=True)
    _ = train_head(train_sub_loader, test_loader, head_cm, epochs=5, lr=5e-3)
    with torch.no_grad():
        logits = (X_test.to(device) @ head_cm.weight.T)
        y_pred = logits.argmax(dim=1).cpu().numpy()
    cm = confusion_matrix(y_test.numpy(), y_pred) if HAVE_SKLEARN else None
    if cm is not None:
        plt.figure(figsize=(4, 4))
        sns.heatmap(cm, annot=False, cmap='Blues')
        plt.xlabel("Pred")
        plt.ylabel("True")
        plt.title("Confusion Matrix (OP-S&V)")
        plt.tight_layout()
        plt.savefig("confusion_matrix_op-snv.pdf", bbox_inches="tight")
        plt.close()

    # Print summary
    print("[Exp1] Summary (accuracy at budgets):")
    for m in results.keys():
        print(f"  {m:8s}: ", [f"{a:.3f}" for a in results[m]["acc"]])


# ------------------------------
# Experiment 2: Text (features), fairness + calibration
# ------------------------------

def soft_rate(logits: torch.Tensor, mask: torch.Tensor, positive: bool = True, alpha: float = 5.0) -> torch.Tensor:
    z = logits[mask]
    if z.numel() == 0:
        return logits.new_tensor(0.5)
    s = torch.sigmoid(alpha * z)
    return s.mean() if positive else (1 - s).mean()


def fairness_loss_pairwise(logits: torch.Tensor, y: torch.Tensor, groups: torch.Tensor, G: int, alpha: float = 5.0) -> torch.Tensor:
    # Approximate equalized odds via TPR/FPR gaps averaged over groups
    y_pos = (y == 1)
    y_neg = (y == 0)
    tpr_all = soft_rate(logits[y_pos], torch.ones_like(y[y_pos], dtype=torch.bool), positive=True, alpha=alpha)
    fpr_all = soft_rate(logits[y_neg], torch.ones_like(y[y_neg], dtype=torch.bool), positive=False, alpha=alpha)
    loss = logits.new_tensor(0.0)
    for g in range(G):
        mg = (groups == g)
        tpr_g = soft_rate(logits[mg & y_pos], torch.ones_like(y[mg & y_pos], dtype=torch.bool), positive=True, alpha=alpha)
        fpr_g = soft_rate(logits[mg & y_neg], torch.ones_like(y[mg & y_neg], dtype=torch.bool), positive=False, alpha=alpha)
        loss = loss + (tpr_g - tpr_all).abs() + (fpr_g - fpr_all).abs()
    return loss / max(1, G)


def validation_gradient_fairness(val_loader: DataLoader, head: nn.Linear, G: int, alpha: float = 5.0) -> torch.Tensor:
    device = next(head.parameters()).device
    head.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
    total_loss = 0.0
    for batch in val_loader:
        if len(batch) == 4:
            Xb, yb, _, gb = batch
        else:
            raise ValueError("Fairness validation loader must provide group ids.")
        Xb = Xb.to(device); yb = yb.to(device); gb = gb.to(device)
        logits = (Xb @ head.weight.T).squeeze()  # for binary classification treat C=1? We'll build C=2 and use logit diff
        # For multi-class head, reduce to class-1 logit as score
        if logits.dim() == 2:
            # Use difference between positive and negative class logits as logit
            logits = logits[:, 1] - logits[:, 0]
        loss = fairness_loss_pairwise(logits, yb, gb, G, alpha=alpha)
        total_loss = total_loss + loss
    total_loss.backward()
    v = head.weight.grad.view(-1).detach()
    head.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
    return v


def experiment2_text_synthetic(seed: int = 13):
    print("\n=== Experiment 2 (Synthetic) — Fairness + Calibration on 'Text-like' features ===")
    set_seed(seed)
    device = get_device()

    # Synthetic binary classification with groups
    N_train, N_val, N_test = 1200, 300, 300
    D, C, G = 48, 2, 4
    # Group-conditional means to simulate bias
    group_means = torch.randn(G, D) * 0.5
    groups_train = torch.randint(0, G, (N_train,))
    groups_val = torch.randint(0, G, (N_val,))
    groups_test = torch.randint(0, G, (N_test,))
    X_train = torch.randn(N_train, D) + group_means[groups_train]
    X_val = torch.randn(N_val, D) + group_means[groups_val]
    X_test = torch.randn(N_test, D) + group_means[groups_test]
    w_true = torch.randn(C, D)
    y_train = (X_train @ w_true.T + 0.3 * torch.randn(N_train, C)).argmax(dim=1)
    y_val = (X_val @ w_true.T + 0.3 * torch.randn(N_val, C)).argmax(dim=1)
    y_test = (X_test @ w_true.T + 0.3 * torch.randn(N_test, C)).argmax(dim=1)
    idx_train = torch.arange(N_train)
    idx_val = torch.arange(N_val)
    idx_test = torch.arange(N_test)

    ds_train = FeatureDataset(X_train, y_train, idx_train, groups_train)
    ds_val = FeatureDataset(X_val, y_val, idx_val, groups_val)
    ds_test = FeatureDataset(X_test, y_test, idx_test, groups_test)

    bsz = 256
    train_loader = DataLoader(ds_train, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=True)
    val_loader = DataLoader(ds_val, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=False)
    test_loader = DataLoader(ds_test, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=False)

    head = nn.Linear(D, C, bias=False).to(device)
    head.weight.data.normal_(0, 0.1)

    # Warm-up Fisher on 20% data
    warm_k = max(1, int(0.2 * N_train))
    warm_idx = np.random.RandomState(seed).choice(N_train, size=warm_k, replace=False)
    warm_loader = DataLoader(FeatureDataset(X_train[warm_idx], y_train[warm_idx], idx_train[warm_idx], groups_train[warm_idx]), batch_size=bsz, shuffle=True)
    print("[Exp2] Computing diagonal Fisher on warm-up slice...")
    fisher = compute_fisher_diag(warm_loader, head)

    # Validation gradients: acc, cal, fairness
    print("[Exp2] Computing validation gradients (acc, cal, fairness)...")
    v_acc = validation_gradient(val_loader, head, objective='acc', temperature=1.0)
    v_cal = validation_gradient(val_loader, head, objective='cal', temperature=1.2)
    v_fair = validation_gradient_fairness(val_loader, head, G=G, alpha=5.0)

    P = head.weight.numel()
    d_hat = 128
    s_idx, s_sign = create_s_idx_sign(P=P, d_hat=d_hat, seed=seed, device=device)

    # OP-S&V with fairness in scoring: s_i = r_i + lam_acc a_acc + lam_cal a_cal + lam_fair a_fair
    def op_snv_select_fair(stream_loader: DataLoader, head: nn.Linear):
        rfd = RFD(d_hat=d_hat, r_max=32, forgetting=0.98, device=device)
        P_inv = 1.0 / (fisher + 1e-6)
        def proj_vec(v):
            vP = v * P_inv
            v_cs = countsketch(vP[None, :], s_idx, s_sign, d_hat)[0]
            U = rfd.basis()
            return U @ (U.T @ v_cs)
        vA = proj_vec(v_acc); vC = proj_vec(v_cal); vF = proj_vec(v_fair)
        nA = vA.norm() + 1e-8; nC = vC.norm() + 1e-8; nF = vF.norm() + 1e-8
        lamA, lamC, lamF = 1.0, 1.0, 1.0
        emaA, emaC, emaF = 0.0, 0.0, 0.0
        budgets = (0.05, 0.1, 0.25)
        reservoir = NestedReservoir(max_k=int(max(budgets)*len(stream_loader.dataset)), seed=seed)
        gamma, beta = 1e-3, 0.9
        for batch in stream_loader:
            Xb, yb, idxb, gb = batch[0].to(device), batch[1].to(device), batch[2], batch[3].to(device)
            logits = Xb @ head.weight.T
            res = per_sample_head_residual(logits, yb)
            g = flatten_head_grads(res, Xb)
            g_cs = countsketch(g, s_idx, s_sign, d_hat)
            tail, delta = rfd.update(g_cs)
            U = rfd.basis()
            proj = g_cs @ U @ U.T
            novelty = (g_cs - proj).pow(2).sum(dim=1)
            aA = torch.clamp(-(g_cs @ vA) / nA, min=0)
            aC = torch.clamp(-(g_cs @ vC) / nC, min=0)
            aF = torch.clamp(-(g_cs @ vF) / nF, min=0)
            # Per-group floors: boost scores for underrepresented groups
            group_counts = torch.bincount(gb, minlength=G).float()
            prop = group_counts / max(1, gb.numel())
            floor_boost = torch.tensor([float(0.01/(prop[g].item()+1e-6)) for g in gb], device=device)
            score = novelty + lamA*aA + lamC*aC + lamF*aF + floor_boost
            for s, idxi in zip(score, idxb):
                key = (hash(int(idxi)) & 0xffffffff) / 2**32
                priority = float((s.item() + 1e-8) / max(gamma, 1e-8) / max(key, 1e-9))
                reservoir.push(int(idxi), 1.0, priority)
            # Controller EMAs, target residuals
            bA = (g_cs @ vA).mean().item(); bC = (g_cs @ vC).mean().item(); bF = (g_cs @ vF).mean().item()
            emaA = beta*emaA + (1-beta)*bA
            emaC = beta*emaC + (1-beta)*bC
            emaF = beta*emaF + (1-beta)*bF
            lamA = float(np.clip(lamA + 0.1*(emaA + 0.01), 0.0, 10.0))
            lamC = float(np.clip(lamC + 0.1*(emaC + 0.005), 0.0, 10.0))
            lamF = float(np.clip(lamF + 0.1*(emaF + 0.005), 0.0, 10.0))
        return reservoir, budgets

    print("[Exp2] Running OP-S&V fairness-aware selection pass...")
    stream_loader = DataLoader(ds_train, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=False)
    reservoir, budgets = op_snv_select_fair(stream_loader, head)

    budget_indices = {}
    for b in budgets:
        k = int(max(1, b * len(ds_train)))
        budget_indices[b] = [idx for idx, _ in reservoir.topk(k)]

    # Baseline: Random stratified by group (simple implementation)
    bl_random = {}
    rng = np.random.RandomState(seed)
    for b in budgets:
        k = int(max(1, b * len(ds_train)))
        # Stratify by group proportion
        idxs = []
        for g in range(G):
            g_idx = np.where(groups_train.numpy() == g)[0]
            take = max(0, int(round(len(g_idx) / len(ds_train) * k)))
            if take > 0:
                sel = rng.choice(g_idx, size=min(take, len(g_idx)), replace=False)
                idxs.extend(sel.tolist())
        if len(idxs) < k:
            # fill remaining randomly
            remain = list(set(range(len(ds_train))) - set(idxs))
            fill = rng.choice(remain, size=k - len(idxs), replace=False).tolist()
            idxs.extend(fill)
        bl_random[b] = idxs[:k]

    # Train/Eval: overall accuracy and worst-group accuracy
    results = {"op-snv": {"acc": [], "worst_group_acc": []},
               "random": {"acc": [], "worst_group_acc": []}}

    def evaluate_worst_group_acc(head_model: nn.Linear) -> Tuple[float, float]:
        head_model.eval()
        with torch.no_grad():
            logits = (X_test.to(device) @ head_model.weight.T)
            pred = logits.argmax(dim=1).cpu()
        overall = (pred.numpy() == y_test.numpy()).mean()
        wg = 1.0
        for g in range(G):
            m = (groups_test.numpy() == g)
            if m.sum() > 0:
                accg = (pred.numpy()[m] == y_test.numpy()[m]).mean()
                wg = min(wg, accg)
        return overall, wg

    for name, bdict in [("op-snv", budget_indices), ("random", bl_random)]:
        print(f"[Exp2] Training/evaluating method: {name}")
        for b in budgets:
            idxs = bdict[b]
            loader = build_loader_from_indices(ds_train, idxs, batch_size=bsz, shuffle=True)
            head_b = nn.Linear(D, C, bias=False).to(device)
            head_b.weight.data.copy_(head.weight.data)
            _ = train_head(loader, test_loader, head_b, epochs=5, lr=5e-3)
            acc, wg = evaluate_worst_group_acc(head_b)
            results[name]["acc"].append(acc)
            results[name]["worst_group_acc"].append(wg)

    # Pareto plot: worst-group vs overall
    plt.figure(figsize=(5, 4))
    for name, color in zip(results.keys(), sns.color_palette(n_colors=len(results))):
        xs = results[name]["acc"]
        ys = results[name]["worst_group_acc"]
        plt.plot(xs, ys, marker='o', label=name, color=color)
    plt.xlabel("Overall accuracy")
    plt.ylabel("Worst-group accuracy")
    plt.title("Pareto: fairness vs accuracy")
    plt.legend(fontsize=8)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig("pareto_fairness_op-snv_vs_baselines.pdf", bbox_inches="tight")
    plt.close()

    print("[Exp2] Summary (overall vs worst-group acc):")
    for name in results:
        pairs = list(zip(results[name]["acc"], results[name]["worst_group_acc"]))
        print(f"  {name:8s}: ", [f"({a:.3f},{w:.3f})" for a, w in pairs])


# ------------------------------
# Experiment 3: Streaming, drift, DP, mergeable reservoirs
# ------------------------------

class DPSketch:
    def __init__(self, C: float = 1.0, sigma: float = 0.3):
        self.C = C
        self.sigma = sigma
    def privatize(self, X: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        norms = X.norm(dim=1, keepdim=True).clamp_min(1e-6)
        Xc = X * (self.C / norms).clamp(max=1.0)
        noise = torch.randn_like(Xc) * self.sigma
        return Xc + noise


def experiment3_streaming_synthetic(seed: int = 13):
    print("\n=== Experiment 3 (Synthetic) — Streaming, Drift, DP, Mergeable Reservoirs ===")
    set_seed(seed)
    device = get_device()

    # Two-phase stream: Stream A (clean), Stream B (shifted)
    D, C = 32, 3
    shards_A = 3
    shards_B = 2
    shard_size = 400

    def make_shard(mean_shift: float = 0.0):
        X = torch.randn(shard_size, D) + mean_shift
        Wt = torch.randn(C, D)
        y = (X @ Wt.T + 0.6 * torch.randn(shard_size, C)).argmax(dim=1)
        idx = torch.arange(shard_size)
        return FeatureDataset(X, y, idx)

    # Global head and hashing
    head = nn.Linear(D, C, bias=False).to(device)
    head.weight.data.normal_(0, 0.1)
    P = head.weight.numel()
    d_hat = 96
    s_idx, s_sign = create_s_idx_sign(P, d_hat, seed=seed, device=device)

    # Simple validation mix (clean + corrupt synthetic)
    val_clean = make_shard(mean_shift=0.0)
    val_corrupt = make_shard(mean_shift=1.0)
    X_val = torch.cat([val_clean.X, val_corrupt.X], dim=0)
    y_val = torch.cat([val_clean.y, val_corrupt.y], dim=0)
    idx_val = torch.arange(X_val.size(0))
    ds_val = FeatureDataset(X_val, y_val, idx_val)
    val_loader = DataLoader(ds_val, batch_size=256, shuffle=False)

    # Initial Fisher and validation grads
    warm_loader = DataLoader(make_shard(mean_shift=0.0), batch_size=256, shuffle=True)
    fisher = compute_fisher_diag(warm_loader, head)
    v_acc = validation_gradient(val_loader, head, objective='acc', temperature=1.0)
    v_cal = validation_gradient(val_loader, head, objective='cal', temperature=1.2)

    # Controller state encapsulated within selection loop (simplified)
    rfd = RFD(d_hat=d_hat, r_max=24, forgetting=0.97, device=device)
    P_inv = 1.0 / (fisher + 1e-6)

    def sketch_and_project(v):
        vP = v * P_inv
        v_cs = countsketch(vP[None, :], s_idx, s_sign, d_hat)[0]
        U = rfd.basis()
        return U @ (U.T @ v_cs)

    vA = sketch_and_project(v_acc)
    vC = sketch_and_project(v_cal)
    nA, nC = vA.norm() + 1e-8, vC.norm() + 1e-8
    lamA, lamC = 1.0, 1.0

    # Global reservoir
    global_res = NestedReservoir(max_k=int(0.25 * (shards_A + shards_B) * shard_size), seed=seed)

    gamma = 1e-3
    dps = DPSketch(C=1.0, sigma=0.25)  # DP noise

    deltas, acc_ckpts_clean, acc_ckpts_shift = [], [], []

    def process_one_shard(ds_shard: FeatureDataset, label: str):
        nonlocal lamA, lamC, vA, vC
        loader = DataLoader(ds_shard, batch_size=256, shuffle=False)
        local_res = NestedReservoir(max_k=int(0.25 * len(ds_shard)), seed=seed)
        for Xb, yb, idxb in loader:
            Xb, yb = Xb.to(device), yb.to(device)
            logits = Xb @ head.weight.T
            res = per_sample_head_residual(logits, yb)
            g = flatten_head_grads(res, Xb)
            g_cs = countsketch(g, s_idx, s_sign, d_hat)
            g_cs = dps.privatize(g_cs)
            tail, delta = rfd.update(g_cs)
            U = rfd.basis()
            proj = g_cs @ U @ U.T
            novelty = (g_cs - proj).pow(2).sum(dim=1)
            aA = torch.clamp(-(g_cs @ vA) / nA, min=0)
            aC = torch.clamp(-(g_cs @ vC) / nC, min=0)
            score = novelty + lamA * aA + lamC * aC
            for s, idxi in zip(score, idxb):
                key = (hash(int(idxi.item())) & 0xffffffff) / 2**32
                priority = float((s.item() + 1e-8) / max(gamma, 1e-8) / max(key, 1e-9))
                local_res.push(int(idxi), 1.0, priority)
            deltas.append(delta)
            # Drift-triggered refresh
            if delta > 0.2:
                print(f"[Exp3] Drift detected (Δ_spec={delta:.3f}) during {label}; refreshing validation gradients.")
                # recompute vA/vC on mixed validation
                vA = sketch_and_project(validation_gradient(val_loader, head, objective='acc', temperature=1.0))
                vC = sketch_and_project(validation_gradient(val_loader, head, objective='cal', temperature=1.2))
        # Merge local into global
        return global_res.merge(local_res)

    # Process Stream A shards (clean)
    for s in range(shards_A):
        ds_shard = make_shard(mean_shift=0.0)
        global_res = process_one_shard(ds_shard, label=f"StreamA_shard{s+1}")
        # Evaluate after shard on synthetic clean/shifted tests
        head_tmp = nn.Linear(D, C, bias=False).to(device)
        head_tmp.weight.data.copy_(head.weight.data)
        # Build a small loader from current global reservoir (indices map to synthetic shard idx only; for synthetic evaluation we train on shard directly)
        _, acc_clean, _ = train_head(DataLoader(ds_shard, batch_size=256, shuffle=True), DataLoader(ds_shard, batch_size=256, shuffle=False), head_tmp, epochs=2, lr=5e-3)
        # Evaluate on shifted
        ds_shift = make_shard(mean_shift=1.0)
        _, acc_shift, _ = train_head(DataLoader(ds_shard, batch_size=256, shuffle=True), DataLoader(ds_shift, batch_size=256, shuffle=False), head_tmp, epochs=2, lr=5e-3)
        acc_ckpts_clean.append(acc_clean)
        acc_ckpts_shift.append(acc_shift)
        print(f"[Exp3] After Stream A shard {s+1}: acc_clean={acc_clean:.3f}, acc_shift={acc_shift:.3f}")

    # Process Stream B shards (shifted)
    for s in range(shards_B):
        ds_shard = make_shard(mean_shift=1.0)
        global_res = process_one_shard(ds_shard, label=f"StreamB_shard{s+1}")
        head_tmp = nn.Linear(D, C, bias=False).to(device)
        head_tmp.weight.data.copy_(head.weight.data)
        _, acc_clean, _ = train_head(DataLoader(ds_shard, batch_size=256, shuffle=True), DataLoader(make_shard(0.0), batch_size=256, shuffle=False), head_tmp, epochs=2, lr=5e-3)
        _, acc_shift, _ = train_head(DataLoader(ds_shard, batch_size=256, shuffle=True), DataLoader(ds_shard, batch_size=256, shuffle=False), head_tmp, epochs=2, lr=5e-3)
        acc_ckpts_clean.append(acc_clean)
        acc_ckpts_shift.append(acc_shift)
        print(f"[Exp3] After Stream B shard {s+1}: acc_clean={acc_clean:.3f}, acc_shift={acc_shift:.3f}")

    # Plot drift index and accuracies
    plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))
    plt.plot(deltas)
    plt.xlabel("Mini-batch")
    plt.ylabel("Δ_spec")
    plt.title("Drift index over stream")
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig("drift_index_streaming.pdf", bbox_inches="tight")
    plt.close()

    plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))
    steps = list(range(1, len(acc_ckpts_clean) + 1))
    plt.plot(steps, acc_ckpts_clean, marker='o', label='clean')
    plt.plot(steps, acc_ckpts_shift, marker='o', label='shifted')
    plt.xlabel("Shard checkpoint")
    plt.ylabel("Accuracy")
    plt.title("Streaming accuracy (clean vs shifted)")
    plt.legend(fontsize=8)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig("accuracy_streaming_clean_vs_corrupt.pdf", bbox_inches="tight")
    plt.close()

    print("[Exp3] Streaming accuracy checkpoints (clean vs shifted):")
    print("  clean:   ", [f"{a:.3f}" for a in acc_ckpts_clean])
    print("  shifted: ", [f"{a:.3f}" for a in acc_ckpts_shift])
